description: Configure an electric vehicle fleet for the Bologna Acosta scenario and analyze the resulting emissions. In the directory /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/, define a vehicle type distribution named "fleet_mix" consisting of 70% conventional vehicles (emissionClass="HBEFA4/PC_petrol_Euro-4") and 30% battery-electric vehicles (emissionClass="HBEFA4/PC_BEV") in a file named ev_vtypes.add.xml. Generate a route file acosta_fleet.rou.xml containing at least 50 trips using this fleet mix. Create a SUMO configuration ev_run.sumocfg that utilizes the acosta_buslanes.net.xml network along with your new vehicle types and routes. Configure the simulation to output emissions to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/emissions.xml and trip information to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_tripinfo.xml. Run the simulation and generate a summary report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ev_fleet_report.txt including the total number of vehicles simulated, the percentage of electric vs conventional vehicles, total CO2 emissions for each vehicle type, and the overall CO2 reduction percentage compared to a 100% conventional fleet.
